<p style="text-align: center;"><strong>Year : </strong>2026 &#124; <strong>Size :</strong> 96 MB</p>
<p>Months have passed since PH34R provoked Gibson Lane into committing a horrific killing spree that put the end of the world as we know it into motion. Now, his older sisters are ready to do whatever it takes to avenge him—and his brother Ellison must decide how far he’ll go as an accomplice to their plans.</p>
<p>The post <a href="https://getcomics.org/other-comics/w0rldtr33-20-2026/">W0rldtr33 #20 (2026)</a> appeared first on <a href="https://getcomics.org">GetComics</a></p>
